variants.description: in BWCNS; studies in fibroblasts show a dramatically reduced level of EMG1 protein in a BWCNS-affected patient compared to normal fibroblasts although patient fibroblasts do not have complete EMG1 deficiency; the mutation increases dimerization of EMG1 subunits suggesting that aggregation of EMG1 leads to reduced levels of the protein; dbSNP:rs74435397
